title: Factory Extension Registry
description: RFC-0015 §4 D3 declarative extension/stage registry. One entry per Factory stage, gate, connector, and runtime, each tagged with a category (intake|plan|review|gate|runtime|connector|observe) and an effect (read-only|read-write), plus its operator-gating state (enabled) and the owning service. Makes the pipeline discoverable, toggleable, and auditable; unifies the RFC-0014 gated-runtime opt-in and the RFC-0012 connector probe chain under one manifest. enabled=false marks a runtime/extension that is GATED OFF until an operator opts in (RFC-0014). Open object; consumers ignore unknown keys.

extensions.name: label-driven-intake
extensions.description: RFC-0011 GitHub-issue intake: labels drive the difficulty tier (factory:low|medium|hard) and the normalizer maps the issue into a NormalizedPlan.

extensions.name: repo-reconnaissance
extensions.description: RFC-0010 code-aware planning: PFactory statically reads the target repo (AST/manifest/HCL parsing, NEVER executes) to ground the plan and detect change_mode.

extensions.name: deploy-analysis
extensions.description: RFC-0013 deployment-aware planning: discovers CI system, deploy mechanism, target environments, and the risk/scan/system-gate policy that follows.

extensions.name: red-team-review
extensions.description: RFC-0015 §4 D1 adversarial spec-review lens: pre-planning lens that tries to break the spec (ambiguous/contradictory/missing ACs, infeasible constraints, wrong-language mismatch). Blocking at/above the RFC-0014 risk threshold; gated until the PFactory lens ships.

extensions.name: standards-conformance-gate
extensions.description: RFC-0012 fail-closed gate proving house standards (and RFC-0015 enforceable constitution clauses) were both retrieved AND applied. Degrades to not_applicable when standards are unavailable, never a false pass.

extensions.name: verification-gate
extensions.description: RFC-0006 never-overclaim VAL gate: no level marked 'passed' above achieved_level; every un-run/failed level carries a reason. Producer omitting the block is treated as VAL-0.

extensions.name: ci-gated-auto-merge
extensions.description: RFC-0009 provider-agnostic CI-gated auto-merge: a green PR is merged only after CI passes; production deploys (VAL-4) are never autonomous.

extensions.name: concurrency-budget-admission
extensions.description: RFC-0016 admission control tying concurrency caps to the RFC-0014 budget: queue when the cap is full, deny when the spend ceiling would be exceeded, else admit.

extensions.name: runtime-claude
extensions.description: RFC-0014 default execution runtime. Always available; all other runtimes are gated off until an operator opts in.

extensions.name: runtime-codex
extensions.description: RFC-0014 gated runtime (OpenAI Codex). Manual operator enable (config/env allowlist + contract opt-in).

extensions.name: runtime-antigravity
extensions.description: RFC-0014 gated runtime (Google Antigravity agent swarms). Manual operator enable; multiplies spend.

extensions.name: runtime-ollama
extensions.description: RFC-0014 gated runtime (local Ollama models). Manual operator enable; local-priced (no $ estimate).

extensions.name: runtime-ollama-cloud
extensions.description: RFC-0014 gated runtime (Ollama Cloud). Manual operator enable; subscription-priced.

extensions.name: runtime-claude-subagents
extensions.description: RFC-0014 speed-up runtime: parallel Claude sub-agent fan-out. Manual operator enable only because it multiplies spend.

extensions.name: runtime-dynamic-workflow
extensions.description: RFC-0014 speed-up runtime: scripted multi-agent orchestration. Manual operator enable only because it multiplies spend.

extensions.name: job-native-scale-out
extensions.description: RFC-0016/RFC-0017 k8s Job-per-task dispatch on the thin nix-base image, KEDA-scaled from the job queue. Each PARR job (plan/build/verify) runs in its own ephemeral Job.

extensions.name: agent-sandbox
extensions.description: AIFactory in-pod unprivileged bwrap OS sandbox (default-on in Helm) isolating agent-run commands; per-task Nix toolchain provisioning (RFC-0005 Tier A).

extensions.name: backstage-catalog
extensions.description: RFC-0012 Backstage Software Catalog probe (catalog_query-catalog-entities) keyed off provenance.repo. Best-effort; degrades to a baseline-only manifest when unreachable.

extensions.name: backstage-techdocs
extensions.description: RFC-0012 Backstage TechDocs probe: records techdocs_refs (URIs, not inlined) the agents must consult. Best-effort.

extensions.name: backstage-scaffolder
extensions.description: RFC-0012 Backstage Scaffolder probe: golden-path templates whose tags intersect the entity. Best-effort.

extensions.name: deployment-metrics-mcp
extensions.description: RFC-0013 deployment-metrics MCP (deploy_history / dora_metrics). Currently a stub; degrades to available=false (delivery health UNKNOWN, never healthy) when unreachable.

extensions.name: cockpit-observability
extensions.description: CFactory cockpit: the single pane reconciling per-service status into the canonical taxonomy, live execution DAG, evidence, and billing-mode usage.

extensions.name: traceability-matrix
extensions.description: RFC-0015 §4 D2 CFactory matrix view rendering verification.traceability[] as AC x test x VAL x verdict.
